calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: July 5, 2006, Judge Pro Tem Richard Beckman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals, Respondent Josephine Abrego appears in Pro Per, Appellant Haydee Ruiz appears in Pro Per. Ms. Sera Mirando, previously sworn,appears with Ms. Ruiz, (her mother). Manuel Gongora, previously sworn, appears to help interpret Spanish to English and English to Spanish.
9:30am
Ms. Abrego testifies in the narrative. Due to problems with interpretation Judge Beckman asks the questions of the parties and witnesses.
10:20am
Judge Beckman requests that Ms. Ruiz provide him with Ms. Chan's phone number. Ms. Ruiz is to provide the number to the court. The Court retains the evidence previously submitted but does not identify or admit any new exhibits. Parties have until 19th to provide the requested materials.
12:12pm
The appellant provides the phone number for the caretaker asked for by the court. (Maria Elena Cienfuentes, at 415 468-3474)
July 12, 2006:
Ms. Abrego provides the court with the materials Judge Richard Beckman asked for. The clerk will have Alisa Hollander - Secretary to the PJ -forward to Judge Beckman
